zh.lifeSummary: 當William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven於大約1360年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾盧維時，他的父親William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven18歲，母親Margaret Logie4歲。他於1396年與Isabelle Larington在英國蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1428年在他的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭培爾盧維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven于大约1360年出生在英国苏格兰培爾盧維时，他的父亲William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven18岁，母亲Margaret Logie4岁。他于1396年与Isabelle Larington在英国苏格兰培爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1428年在他的家乡享年69岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰培爾盧維。

nameMeanings.name: Ruthven
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name, traditionally pronounced ‘Ri-ven’, from Ruthven by Huntingtower (Perthshire); also possibly from Ruthven (Angus) and various other places of that name throughout Scotland, named either with Gaelic ruadh ‘red’ + mhaighin ‘place’ or with a cognate of Welsh rhudd faen ‘red stone’. The oldest family of this name, the lords of the barony of Ruthven by Perth, were descended from Thor, son of Swain, lord of Tranent in Lothian and first sheriff of Edinburgh on record in the mid 12th century. The family eventually gained the title of Earl of Gowrie, but because of what became known as ‘the Gowrie Conspiracy’ the title was forfeited and from 1600 to 1641 the surname itself was proscribed. The title was later restored to the family, and the present Earl of Gowrie bears the surname Ruthven.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven was born about 1360, in Ruthven, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven, was 18 and his mother, Margaret Logie, was 4. He married Isabelle Larington in 1396, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1428, in his hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in Ruthven, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven est né environ 1360, à Ruthven, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Margaret Logie, avait 4 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle Larington en 1396, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1428, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Ruthven, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven um 1360 in Ruthven, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven 18 und seine Mutter Margaret Logie 4. Er hat 1396 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Isabelle Larington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1428 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ruthven, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven è nato il circa 1360 nel Ruthven, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Logie, aveva 4 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle Larington nel 1396, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1428, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Ruthven, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Ruthven Laird of Ruthvenが約1360年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアルスベンで生まれた時，父William Ruthven Laird of Ruthvenは18歳，母Margaret Logieは4歳であった。1396年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアでIsabelle Laringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1428年に故郷で69歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアルスベンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven(이)가 대략 1360년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 루스븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Logie(은)는 4세였다. 그는 1396년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 Isabelle Larington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1428년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 루스븐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven nasceu aproximadamente 1360, em Ruthven, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Logie, tinha 4 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle Larington em 1396, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1428, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Ruthven, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven родился около 1360 г. в местности рутвен, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Logie, 4. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle Larington в 1396 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1428 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности рутвен, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven nació aproximadamente 1360, en Ruthven, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Margaret Logie, tenía 4 años. Se casó con Isabelle Larington en 1396, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1428, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Ruthven, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
